preconditions: I can only create a payment instruction A if it is not the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I create a payment instruction A, it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered

allocate_payer_account.description: allocate a payer account B to a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only allocate a payer account B to a payment instruction A if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only allocate a payer account B to a payment instruction A if it is not the case that A has a reserved account
effects: Once I allocate a payer account B to a payment instruction A, it is the case that A is an instruction assigned to the payer account B and A has a reserved account
Once I allocate a payer account B to a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

deallocate_payer_account.description: deallocate a payer account B from a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only deallocate a payer account B from a payment instruction A if it is the case that A is an instruction assigned to the payer account B
I can only deallocate a payer account B from a payment instruction A if it is not the case that A is scheduled and it is not the case that A is consolidated
effects: Once I deallocate a payer account B from a payment instruction A, it is the case that B is available

Once I deallocate a payer account B from a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that A is an instruction assigned to the payer account B and it is not the case anymore that A has a reserved account and it is not the case anymore that A has confirmed manifest validation and it is not the case anymore that A has been validated and it is not the case anymore that A has an operator override flag and it is not the case anymore that A is finalized and it is not the case anymore that foreign exchange has been applied to A

attach_manifest.description: attach a release manifest B to a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only attach a release manifest B to a payment instruction A if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and B is available
effects: Once I attach a release manifest B to a payment instruction A, it is the case that A has been assigned to B
Once I attach a release manifest B to a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_manifest.description: detach a release manifest B from a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only detach a release manifest B from a payment instruction A if it is the case that A has been assigned to B
effects: Once I detach a release manifest B from a payment instruction A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a release manifest B from a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that A has been assigned to B

confirm_manifest_association.description: confirm manifest association between a payment instruction A and a release manifest B
preconditions: I can only confirm manifest association between a payment instruction A and a release manifest B if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and A has a reserved account and A has been assigned to B
I can only confirm manifest association between a payment instruction A and a release manifest B if it is not the case that A has confirmed manifest validation
effects: Once I confirm manifest association between a payment instruction A and a release manifest B, it is the case that A has confirmed manifest validation

operator_approve.description: approve a payment instruction A using an operator authorization token B
preconditions: I can only approve a payment instruction A using an operator authorization token B if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and A has a reserved account and B is available
I can only approve a payment instruction A using an operator authorization token B if it is not the case that A has confirmed manifest validation
effects: Once I approve a payment instruction A using an operator authorization token B, it is the case that A has confirmed manifest validation and A has an operator override flag
Once I approve a payment instruction A using an operator authorization token B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

file_validate_instruction.description: validate a payment instruction A with a release manifest B using a file validator C
preconditions: I can only validate a payment instruction A with a release manifest B using a file validator C if it is the case that A has confirmed manifest validation and A has a reserved account and A has been assigned to B and C is available
I can only validate a payment instruction A with a release manifest B using a file validator C if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I validate a payment instruction A with a release manifest B using a file validator C, it is the case that A has been validated
Once I validate a payment instruction A with a release manifest B using a file validator C, it is not the case anymore that A has an operator override flag

rail_acceptance_validate.description: validate a payment instruction A on a settlement rail B
preconditions: I can only validate a payment instruction A on a settlement rail B if it is the case that A has a reserved account and A is bound to the settlement rail B
I can only validate a payment instruction A on a settlement rail B if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I validate a payment instruction A on a settlement rail B, it is the case that A has been validated
Once I validate a payment instruction A on a settlement rail B, it is not the case anymore that A has an operator override flag

reserve_liquidity.description: reserve a liquidity reserve B for a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only reserve a liquidity reserve B for a payment instruction A if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a liquidity reserve B for a payment instruction A, it is the case that B has been reserved for A
Once I reserve a liquidity reserve B for a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_liquidity.description: release a liquidity reserve B from a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only release a liquidity reserve B from a payment instruction A if it is the case that B has been reserved for A
effects: Once I release a liquidity reserve B from a payment instruction A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a liquidity reserve B from a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B has been reserved for A

reserve_routing.description: reserve a routing option B for a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only reserve a routing option B for a payment instruction A if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a routing option B for a payment instruction A, it is the case that B has been assigned to A
Once I reserve a routing option B for a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_routing.description: release a routing option B from a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only release a routing option B from a payment instruction A if it is the case that B has been assigned to A
effects: Once I release a routing option B from a payment instruction A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a routing option B from a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B has been assigned to A

reserve_funding_agent.description: reserve a funding agent B for a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only reserve a funding agent B for a payment instruction A if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a funding agent B for a payment instruction A, it is the case that B has been assigned to A
Once I reserve a funding agent B for a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_funding_agent.description: release a funding agent B from a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only release a funding agent B from a payment instruction A if it is the case that B has been assigned to A
effects: Once I release a funding agent B from a payment instruction A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a funding agent B from a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B has been assigned to A

reserve_correspondent.description: reserve a correspondent code B for a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only reserve a correspondent code B for a payment instruction A if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a correspondent code B for a payment instruction A, it is the case that B has been assigned to A
Once I reserve a correspondent code B for a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_correspondent.description: release a correspondent code B from a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only release a correspondent code B from a payment instruction A if it is the case that B has been assigned to A
effects: Once I release a correspondent code B from a payment instruction A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a correspondent code B from a payment instruction A, it is not the case anymore that B has been assigned to A

schedule_execution_slot.description: schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B using a liquidity reserve C and a routing option D
preconditions: I can only schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B using a liquidity reserve C and a routing option D if it is the case that A has a reserved account and C has been reserved for A and D has been assigned to A and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B using a liquidity reserve C and a routing option D if it is not the case that A is scheduled
effects: Once I schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B using a liquidity reserve C and a routing option D, it is the case that A is scheduled on B and A is scheduled
Once I schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B using a liquidity reserve C and a routing option D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

schedule_execution_with_fx.description: schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B with a funding agent C and a fx service D
preconditions: I can only schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B with a funding agent C and a fx service D if it is the case that A has a reserved account and C has been assigned to A and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D
I can only schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B with a funding agent C and a fx service D if it is not the case that A is scheduled
effects: Once I schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B with a funding agent C and a fx service D, it is the case that A is scheduled on B and A is scheduled and foreign exchange has been applied to A and A has an operator override flag

Once I schedule a payment instruction A on an execution slot B with a funding agent C and a fx service D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

consolidate_preexecution.description: consolidate preexecution for a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B and a routing option C
preconditions: I can only consolidate preexecution for a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B and a routing option C if it is the case that A is scheduled and foreign exchange has been applied to A and B has been reserved for A and C has been assigned to A
effects: Once I consolidate preexecution for a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B and a routing option C, it is not the case anymore that foreign exchange has been applied to A and it is not the case anymore that A has an operator override flag

grant_consolidation.description: grant consolidation for a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B, a routing option C, and a clearing member profile D
preconditions: I can only grant consolidation for a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B, a routing option C, and a clearing member profile D if it is the case that A has been validated and A is scheduled and B has been reserved for A and C has been assigned to A and A is bound to D

I can only grant consolidation for a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B, a routing option C, and a clearing member profile D if it is not the case that A has an operator override flag and it is not the case that A is consolidated
effects: Once I grant consolidation for a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B, a routing option C, and a clearing member profile D, it is the case that A is consolidated

grant_consolidation_with_funding.description: grant consolidation with funding for a payment instruction A using a funding agent B, a correspondent code C, and a settlement member profile D
preconditions: I can only grant consolidation with funding for a payment instruction A using a funding agent B, a correspondent code C, and a settlement member profile D if it is the case that A has been validated and A is scheduled and B has been assigned to A and C has been assigned to A and A is bound to D
I can only grant consolidation with funding for a payment instruction A using a funding agent B, a correspondent code C, and a settlement member profile D if it is not the case that A is consolidated
effects: Once I grant consolidation with funding for a payment instruction A using a funding agent B, a correspondent code C, and a settlement member profile D, it is the case that A is consolidated and A has an operator override flag

apply_final_authorization.description: apply final authorization to a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B and a routing option C
preconditions: I can only apply final authorization to a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B and a routing option C if it is the case that A is consolidated and A has an operator override flag and B has been reserved for A and C has been assigned to A
effects: Once I apply final authorization to a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B and a routing option C, it is the case that A is finalized

Once I apply final authorization to a payment instruction A with a liquidity reserve B and a routing option C, it is not the case anymore that A has an operator override flag and it is not the case anymore that A has been validated and it is not the case anymore that foreign exchange has been applied to A

reapply_validation.description: reapply validation to a payment instruction A using a release manifest B and a file validator C
preconditions: I can only reapply validation to a payment instruction A using a release manifest B and a file validator C if it is the case that A is finalized and A is consolidated and A has a reserved account and A has been assigned to B and C is available
I can only reapply validation to a payment instruction A using a release manifest B and a file validator C if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I reapply validation to a payment instruction A using a release manifest B and a file validator C, it is the case that A has been validated

mark_manifest_ready.description: mark a payment instruction A as manifest ready in a release manifest B
preconditions: I can only mark a payment instruction A as manifest ready in a release manifest B if it is the case that A is consolidated and A has been validated and A has been assigned to B
I can only mark a payment instruction A as manifest ready in a release manifest B if it is not the case that A has an operator override flag and it is not the case that A is manifest ready
effects: Once I mark a payment instruction A as manifest ready in a release manifest B, it is the case that A is manifest ready

authorize_with_operator_token.description: authorize a payment instruction A with an operator authorization token B
preconditions: I can only authorize a payment instruction A with an operator authorization token B if it is the case that A is consolidated and A has been validated and B is available
I can only authorize a payment instruction A with an operator authorization token B if it is not the case that A has an operator override flag and it is not the case that A is manifest ready
effects: Once I authorize a payment instruction A with an operator authorization token B, it is the case that A is manifest ready
Once I authorize a payment instruction A with an operator authorization token B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

commit_to_rail.description: commit a payment instruction A to a settlement rail B
preconditions: I can only commit a payment instruction A to a settlement rail B if it is the case that A is manifest ready and B is available and A is compatible with the settlement rail B
effects: Once I commit a payment instruction A to a settlement rail B, it is the case that A is committed to B
Once I commit a payment instruction A to a settlement rail B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_interparty_rail.description: bind a responding node A to a settlement rail C with an originating node B
preconditions: I can only bind a responding node A to a settlement rail C with an originating node B if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and the responding node for A is active and A is allowed on the settlement rail C and B is committed to C
I can only bind a responding node A to a settlement rail C with an originating node B if it is not the case that A is bound to the settlement rail C
effects: Once I bind a responding node A to a settlement rail C with an originating node B, it is the case that A is bound to the settlement rail C

mark_ready_for_release.description: mark a payment instruction A as ready for release with a release manifest B and a file validator C
preconditions: I can only mark a payment instruction A as ready for release with a release manifest B and a file validator C if it is the case that A is an instruction that has been registered and the responding node for A is active and A has been validated and A is manifest ready and A has been assigned to B and C is available
I can only mark a payment instruction A as ready for release with a release manifest B and a file validator C if it is not the case that A is ready for release
effects: Once I mark a payment instruction A as ready for release with a release manifest B and a file validator C, it is the case that A is ready for release

finalize_and_trigger_release.description: finalize and trigger release for a payment instruction A
preconditions: I can only finalize and trigger release for a payment instruction A if it is the case that the originating node for A is active and A is an instruction that has been registered and A has a reserved account and A is scheduled and A is consolidated and A is manifest ready and A has been validated
I can only finalize and trigger release for a payment instruction A if it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I finalize and trigger release for a payment instruction A, it is the case that A is finally released

finalize_with_rail_binding.description: finalize a payment instruction A with rail binding to a settlement rail B
preconditions: I can only finalize a payment instruction A with rail binding to a settlement rail B if it is the case that the responding node for A is active and A is an instruction that has been registered and A has a reserved account and A is scheduled and A is consolidated and A is manifest ready and A has been validated and A is bound to the settlement rail B
I can only finalize a payment instruction A with rail binding to a settlement rail B if it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I finalize a payment instruction A with rail binding to a settlement rail B, it is the case that A is finally released

finalize_with_manifest_release.description: finalize a payment instruction A with manifest release
preconditions: I can only finalize a payment instruction A with manifest release if it is the case that the responding node for A is active and A is an instruction that has been registered and A has a reserved account and A is scheduled and A is consolidated and A is manifest ready and A has been validated and A is ready for release
I can only finalize a payment instruction A with manifest release if it is not the case that A is finally released
effects: Once I finalize a payment instruction A with manifest release, it is the case that A is finally released

action_nl_templates_indef.attach_manifest: attach a release manifest {?release_manifest} to a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_manifest: detach a release manifest {?release_manifest} from a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_manifest_association: confirm manifest association between a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} and a release manifest {?release_manifest}
action_nl_templates_indef.operator_approve: approve a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} using an operator authorization token {?operator_authorization_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.file_validate_instruction: validate a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with a release manifest {?release_manifest} using a file validator {?file_validator}
action_nl_templates_indef.rail_acceptance_validate: validate a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} on a settlement rail {?settlement_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_liquidity: reserve a liquidity reserve {?liquidity_reserve} for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_liquidity: release a liquidity reserve {?liquidity_reserve} from a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_routing: reserve a routing option {?routing_option} for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_routing: release a routing option {?routing_option} from a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_funding_agent: reserve a funding agent {?funding_agent} for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_funding_agent: release a funding agent {?funding_agent} from a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_correspondent: reserve a correspondent code {?correspondent_code} for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_correspondent: release a correspondent code {?correspondent_code} from a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_execution_slot: schedule a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} on an execution slot {?execution_slot} using a liquidity reserve {?liquidity_reserve} and a routing option {?routing_option}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_execution_with_fx: schedule a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} on an execution slot {?execution_slot} with a funding agent {?funding_agent} and a fx service {?fx_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.consolidate_preexecution: consolidate preexecution for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with a liquidity reserve {?liquidity_reserve} and a routing option {?routing_option}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_consolidation: grant consolidation for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with a liquidity reserve {?liquidity_reserve}, a routing option {?routing_option}, and a clearing member profile {?clearing_member_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_consolidation_with_funding: grant consolidation with funding for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} using a funding agent {?funding_agent}, a correspondent code {?correspondent_code}, and a settlement member profile {?settlement_member_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_final_authorization: apply final authorization to a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with a liquidity reserve {?liquidity_reserve} and a routing option {?routing_option}
action_nl_templates_indef.reapply_validation: reapply validation to a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} using a release manifest {?release_manifest} and a file validator {?file_validator}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_manifest_ready: mark a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} as manifest ready in a release manifest {?release_manifest}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_with_operator_token: authorize a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with an operator authorization token {?operator_authorization_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_to_rail: commit a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} to a settlement rail {?settlement_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_interparty_rail: bind a responding node {?responding_party_node} to a settlement rail {?settlement_rail} with an originating node {?originating_party_node}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ready_for_release: mark a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} as ready for release with a release manifest {?release_manifest} and a file validator {?file_validator}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_and_trigger_release: finalize and trigger release for a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_with_rail_binding: finalize a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with rail binding to a settlement rail {?settlement_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_with_manifest_release: finalize a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} with manifest release

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a payment instruction or a payer account or a execution slot or a routing option or a liquidity reserve or a funding agent or a release manifest or a operator authorization token or a settlement rail or a file validator or a fx service or a correspondent code or a participant profile is also a entity
Everything that is a clearing member profile or a settlement member profile is also a participant profile
Everything that is a originating node or a responding node is also a payment instruction
